title: Mattel Disney Princess Toys, Small Doll 4-Pack with Rapunzel, Flynn Rider & Mother Gothel, Plus Maximus Horse w/Saddle, Inspired by Movie, JHG85
features: Inspired by the movie Disney's Tangled, this Rapunzel set includes four characters to allow kids to tell the story from beginning to end!
Includes three posable small dolls and one animal friend: Rapunzel, Flynn Rider, villain Mother Gothel, and Maximus the horse all designed in 3.5-inch scale.
Maximus includes a bridle and saddle perfect for rides around the kingdom with this Rapunzel doll.
Kids will love playing out their favorite movie moments or making up their own magical stories with these core characters.
Fans can collect all the Disney Princess Character Sets for the ultimate storytelling fun! Each sold separately, subject to availability.
description: From the manufacturer Dolls From classic Disney movies to modern releases, Disney Princess dolls are inspired by the animated characters that kids love. Each doll celebrates the character’s unique story with sparkling fashions and a signature look Playsets Iconic locations and scenes from Disney movies come to life in Disney Princess playsets! From castles to carriages to fairy-tale furniture, these playsets are filled with storytelling moments and magical discoveries. Surprises Disney Princess offers innovative ways to play out timeless Princess stories. Whether it’s color change, transformation or reveals, kids will delight in all the magical surprises—just like in their favorite Disney movies! With unforgettable characters and movie moments that inspire kids to dream and grow, Disney Princess toys help kids re-create their favorite Disney stories and imagine new adventures of their own!
